docket_entries.description: REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO 01/09/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY KING, KIERSTYN AKA KIERSTYN DARKWATER AS TO DEFENDANT HOUDIJK, ANTHONIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

TRIAL RESET TO JAN-09-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF DEC-05-2016 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
